allow: Bash(node -e "const l=require\('lucide-react'\); const names=['Box','Boxes','Gauge','CircleGauge','Layers','Palette','PaintBucket','Brush','Wrench','Settings','Settings2','Sliders','Hash','Ruler','Shield','ShieldCheck','Award','Factory','Download','FileText','FileBadge','Container','Cylinder','Wind','Droplets','Plus','Minus','ArrowRight','ArrowUpRight','Check','CheckCircle2','CircleCheck','Phone','Building2','User','Globe','MapPin','Send','X','ChevronDown','Cog','Disc','Disc3','PanelTop','Frame','Component','Anchor','Eye','Maximize2','Move','Headset','BadgeCheck','ClipboardCheck','Beaker','Pill','UtensilsCrossed','FlaskConical','Wind']; const missing=names.filter\(n=>!l[n]\); console.log\('MISSING:', missing.join\(', '\)||'none'\); console.log\('total exports:', Object.keys\(l\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('lucide-react'\); const names=['RefreshCw','TrendingUp','Zap','HeartPulse','Droplets','ShieldCheck','Wind','Factory','Pill','UtensilsCrossed','FlaskConical','BadgeCheck','Award','Headset','FileText','FileBadge','Ruler','BookOpen','Box','Gauge','Layers','Wrench','Palette','PaintBucket','Settings2','CircleGauge','Plus','Minus','X','Send','Loader2','User','Building2','Mail','Phone','Globe','MapPin','ChevronDown','Check','CheckCircle2','ArrowRight','Download','Sparkles','PenTool','Quote','ShieldCheck']; const missing=names.filter\(n=>!l[n]\); console.log\('MISSING:', missing.join\(', '\)||'none'\);")
